_publications._publicationTitle: ALTERED CALCIUM CURRENTS AND AXONAL GROWTH IN Nf1 HAPLOINSUFFICIENT MICE.

_contextSnippet: primary hippocampal neurons from postnatal day 1 wild-type and Nf1 mice cultured for 5–7 days +/− in vitro
details: Used as wild-type controls for comparison with Nf1(+/-) mice in calcium current and neurite outgrowth studies
